description: Export plugin examples for textmode.js export workflows.

groups.name: ExportPlugin
groups.description: Plugin installation, overlay controls, export helpers, and layer-targeted exports.

examples.title: ExportPlugin.init
examples.description: Creates a textmode sketch with ExportPlugin installed and a live overlay ready for manual export flows.

examples.title: ExportPlugin.layerTargets
examples.description: Draws base, foreground, and annotation layers so TXT, JSON, and SVG exports can target individual layers.
